summary: Iteration 31 — Project-wise Dashboard fully tested. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests PASS (list endpoint, full payload shape, 404 on bad id, financials math, manpower trend shape, recent activity shape, RBAC for super_admin/site_engineer/supervisor/dept_head). Frontend: picker grid (24 cards) loads, search filter works, clicking E2E project card navigates to detail page, all 6 KPI tiles present (Contract ₹10L, Billed 0%, Outstanding ₹0, GP% 0%, Manpower 0, Open Safety 0), Financial Snapshot card + Charts (Manpower trend + Cashflow waterfall) + Procurement (PR=1, PO=1) + Execution (DPRs=1) + Safety + Recent Activity (RA Bill, Measurement, DPR) all render correctly, Refresh & Back buttons work, sidebar nav 'Project Dashboard' visible for super_admin.

minor.issue: Spec said sales_executive should be 403, but actual RBAC base defines projects.read={'*'} (wildcard) so sales_executive currently gets 200. Either the spec or the RBAC matrix needs to be reconciled. Site_engineer/supervisor/dept_head correctly get 200 as spec requires.

issues: When the only DPR is older than 30d (seeded DPR date 2026-04-10 vs today 2026-05-21), the Manpower-trend chart renders empty with 'No DPRs in the last 30 days.' below it — that's the documented graceful fallback. No bug, but flagging because the cashflow waterfall still shows the contract value bar, which can look visually unbalanced when paired with an empty trend chart.

action_items: Reconcile RBAC: either remove the projects.read wildcard for sales_executive in rbac.py PERMISSIONS_BASE (lines 46-50) so sales gets 403 on dashboard endpoints as spec requires, OR update the spec/sidebar gating to acknowledge sales has projects.read.
(Optional) Consider 0-filling missing days in execution.manpower_trend_30d so the AreaChart doesn't look sparse when only a couple of DPR dates exist.
critical_code_review_comments: project_dashboard_router.py: `_link_query(project)` is recomputed inside every helper (_financials, _site_execution, _procurement, _safety, _recent_activity). Compute once and pass it in to save a tiny per-helper recompute (minor perf, not a bug).

project_dashboard_router.py _financials (line 88): `p.get('total') or p.get('amount') or p.get('grand_total')` — if total is 0 (legit zero PO), this falls through to grand_total which is fine; just note 'or' chains silently swap fields on zero/None.

project_dashboard_router.py _safe_iso_date: works, but DPRs older than 30 days are silently skipped from manpower_today/trend even though they remain in dpr_count_total — UI showed 'DPRs (total) 1, 0 in 30d' for E2E project, which is correct but worth flagging that the chart will look empty.
project_dashboard_router.py _recent_activity uses `.sort([('created_at', -1)])` but some collections may not have created_at indexed — fine for small datasets but worth flagging for future scale.
RBAC matrix: projects.read={'*'} wildcard grants all 14 roles read access — review whether sales_executive truly needs to read /api/projects + /api/project-dashboard/*.
test_credentials: admin@erp.com / Admin@123 ; sales@erp.com / Sales@123 ; test_site_engineer@erp.com / TestPass@123 ; supervisor@erp.com / Super@1234 ; depthead.ops@erp.com / DeptHead@123
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Tests are read-only against the existing E2E project f2f38e64-fd4a-4b5b-869c-78db3f08be04 (already seeded by main agent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features in the review request are verified at API + UI level. (1) GET /project-dashboard/projects returns lightweight list (24 projects) — confirmed shape id/code/name/client/status/budget, no _id leakage. (2) GET /project-dashboard/{e2e_id} returns full payload — verified all 8 top-level keys (project, kpis, financials, execution, procurement, safety, recent_activity, generated_at) plus 6 KPI fields all numeric. (3) Bad project_id → 404 with 'Project not found' confirmed. (4) Financials math validated: progress_billed_pct = bills_raised/contract_value*100, gp_pct = (rev-cost)/rev*100 (or 0 when rev=0). (5) E2E project shows non-zero counts: 1 DPR, 1 PR, 1 PO, 1 RA bill, 1 measurement — all linked via project_code per _link_query. (6) kpis block all numeric. (7) manpower_trend_30d is a sorted list ≤30 entries; DPRs without parseable date are skipped (graceful). (8) RBAC: super_admin/site_engineer/supervisor/dept_head ALL get 200; sales_executive ALSO gets 200 (NOT 403 as spec said — see flagged minor item). (9) Frontend picker grid + clicking card → detail layout with KPI strip + Financials + Charts + Procurement + Execution + Safety + Recent renders correctly. Refresh & Back buttons functional. Sidebar nav 'Project Dashboard' present under Operations for super_admin.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — feature is functional. The only discrepancy is a spec-vs-RBAC mismatch on sales_executive permission, which is a policy decision rather than a bug.
